body: Thanks for the follow-up, Tomoko — I appreciated your thoughts on the carbon capture space in your last note. I've been doing a deeper dive into [Verdant Mineralization](companies/verdant-mineralization) over the past few weeks, and I think there's a genuinely compelling Series A story there once they get their pilot unit economics tightened up. Given that both our firms have been circling the enhanced weathering vertical, it might be worth getting on a call to compare notes before the holidays fully swallow everyone's calendars. I know [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has been more focused on the software and monitoring layer, whereas your team tends to go deeper into the physical process side, so there could be a real complementary angle here. Would early January work for a 30-minute sync? Happy to send a calendar link if so.
